title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform for growing Shopify e-commerce brands, founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India.
* The software combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to boost customer lifetime value (LTV).
* It features loyalty programs including points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* The platform's integrated review management automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews via scheduled emails or SMS.
* The software automatically syncs verified reviews with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* It offers referral and membership incentives to construct custom referral networks.

* Integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.  
* Allows businesses to create custom referral networks and membership tiers with perks like early access to products, free shipping, or special discounts.  
* Provides built-in email marketing flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.  
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
